per_rule.rule_description: Minimum spacing of NW (or) PW at different potential is 180nm
Minimum spacing of NW (or) PW at same potential is 110nm
Minimum width of NW is 160nm
Minimum area of NW is 0.140 um2
Minimum enclosed area of NW is 0.140 um2
NW Must be orthogonal
Minimum extension of NW past CHANNEL_A is 80nm
per_rule.rule_script:
CHANNEL_A_VERTICAL_EDGES = CHANNEL_A ANGLE == 90
NW_VERTICAL_EDGES = NW ANGLE == 90
INTERNAL NW_VERTICAL_EDGES CHANNEL_A_VERTICAL_EDGES < 0.080

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum extension of NW past CHANNEL_B is 80nm
per_rule.rule_script:
CHANNEL_B_VERTICAL_EDGES = CHANNEL_B ANGLE == 90
NW_VERTICAL_EDGES = NW ANGLE == 90
INTERNAL NW_VERTICAL_EDGES CHANNEL_B_VERTICAL_EDGES < 0.080

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum extension of NW past CHANNEL_AB is 80nm
per_rule.rule_script:
CHANNEL_AB_VERTICAL_EDGES = CHANNEL_AB ANGLE == 90
NW_VERTICAL_EDGES = NW ANGLE == 90
INTERNAL NW_VERTICAL_EDGES CHANNEL_AB_VERTICAL_EDGES < 0.080

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum vertical width of ACT layer is 48nm
Minimum Incremental vertical width of ACT layer is 40nm
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES = ACT ANGLE == 0
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES < 0.048
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.048 < 0.088
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.088 < 0.128
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.128 < 0.168
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.168 < 0.208
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.208 < 0.248
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.248 < 0.288
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.288 < 0.328
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.328 < 0.368
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.368 < 0.408
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.408 < 0.448
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.448 < 0.488
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.488 < 0.528
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.528 < 0.568
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.568 < 0.608
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.608 < 0.648
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.648 < 0.688
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.688 < 0.728
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.728 < 0.768
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.768 < 0.808
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.808 < 0.848
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.848 < 0.888
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.888 < 0.928
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.928 < 0.968
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.968 < 1.008

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum vertical spacing of ACT is 62nm
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES = ACT ANGLE == 0
EXTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES < 0.062 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of ACT is 96nm
Horizontal spacing of ACT  must be 32nm, 96nm or >= 160nm
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_VERTICAL_EDGES = ACT ANGLE == 90
EXTERNAL ACT_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0 < 0.032 OPPOSITE
EXTERNAL ACT_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.032 < 0.096 OPPOSITE
EXTERNAL ACT_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.096 < 0.16 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum notch of ACT is 112nm
Minimum spacing of NW to ACT is 31nm
Minimum enclosure of NW to ACT is 31nm
Minimum area of ACT is 0.004608 um2
Minimum enclosed area of ACT is 0.004608 um2
Maximum distance between ACT forming a MOS device and ACT forming a bulk/substrate contact within the same well/substrate is 30um, to prevent latch up
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_MOS_DEV_A = GATEA AND ACT
ACT_MOS_DEV_B = GATEB AND ACT
ACT_CONTACT = AIL1 AND ACT
NTAP = NW AND NIM
AIL1_NTAP = ACT_CONTACT AND NTAP
AIL1_PTAP = ACT_CONTACT AND PIM
a = AIL1_NTAP SIZE BY 30
ACT_MOS_DEV_A NOT INSIDE a
ACT_MOS_DEV_B NOT INSIDE a
b = AIL1_PTAP SIZE BY 30
ACT_MOS_DEV_A NOT INSIDE b
ACT_MOS_DEV_B NOT INSIDE b

per_rule.rule_description: Exact horizontal width of GATE [A] is 20, 16 or 14 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges < 0.014
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges > 0.014 < 0.016
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges > 0.016 < 0.020
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges > 0.020 < 0.200

per_rule.rule_description: Exact horizontal width of GATE [B] is 20, 16 or 14 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges < 0.014
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges > 0.014 < 0.016
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges > 0.016 < 0.020
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges > 0.020 < 0.200

per_rule.rule_description: Min horizontal pitch of GATE [A] is 128 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
x = INT GATEA_vertical_edges < 1
y = DFM COPY x CENTERLINE
y_copy = EXPAND EDGE y INSIDE BY 0.0001
y_copy_vertical_edge =  y_copy ANGLE ==90
EXT y_copy_vertical_edge < 0.127 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Min horizontal pitch of GATE [B] is 128 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
x = INT GATEB_vertical_edges < 1
y = DFM COPY x CENTERLINE
y_copy = EXPAND EDGE y INSIDE BY 0.0001
y_copy_vertical_edge =  y_copy ANGLE ==90
EXT y_copy_vertical_edge < 0.127 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal spacing of GATE[A] and GATE[B] is 44 nm
GATE[A] may not bend
GATE[B] may not bend
Minimum extension of ACT past GATE [A] is 38nm
Minimum extension of ACT past GATE [B] is 38nm
Minimum extension of GATE [A] past ACT is 62nm
Minimum extension of GATE [B] past ACT is 62nm
Minimum length of Gate A (vertical edge, gate C ignored) 200nm
Minimum length of Gate B (vertical edge, gate C ignored) 200nm
(gatea not gatec) maximum distance to neighbor shape on same design mask is 236nm
per_rule.rule_script:
GateAnotC = GATEA NOT GATEC
x = SIZE GateAnotC BY 0.237
GATEA NOT x

per_rule.rule_description: (gateb not gatec) maximum distance to neighbor shape 236nm
per_rule.rule_script:
GateBnotC = GATEB NOT GATEC
x = SIZE GateBnotC BY 0.237
GATEB NOT x

per_rule.rule_description: Exact horizontal width of GATE [AB] is 20, 16 or 14 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES < 0.014
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.014 < 0.016
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.016 < 0.020
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.020 < 0.800

per_rule.rule_description: Min horizontal pitch of GATE [AB] is 64nm
per_rule.rule_script:
x = INT GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES < 1
y = DFM COPY x CENTERLINE
y_copy = EXPAND EDGE y INSIDE BY 0.0001
EXT y_copy < 0.063 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal spacing of GATE[AB] is 44 nm
GATE[AB] may not bend
Minimum extension of ACT past GATE [AB] is 38nm
Minimum extension of GATE [AB] past ACT is 62nm
Minimum length of Gate AB (vertical edge, gate C ignored) 200nm
(gateAB not gatec) maximum distance to neighbor shape 236nm
per_rule.rule_script:
GateABnotC = GATEAB NOT GATEC
x = SIZE GateABnotC BY 0.237
GATEAB NOT x

per_rule.rule_description: Exact vertical width of GATEC is 32nm (1 is arbitrary large value) shape is oriented horizonally
per_rule.rule_script:
vert_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 90
hor_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 0
vert_edges_int = INT vert_edges < 1
hor_edges_int = INT hor_edges < 1
vert_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check1 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] < 0
hor_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check2 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] > 0
hor_edges_hor_pol = hor_polygons angle == 0
INT hor_edges_hor_pol > 0 < 0.032
INT hor_edges_hor_pol > 0.032 < 1

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal length of GATEC is 128nm shape is oriented horizonatally
per_rule.rule_script:
vert_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 90
hor_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 0
vert_edges_int = INT vert_edges < 1
hor_edges_int = INT hor_edges < 1
vert_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check1 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] < 0
hor_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check2 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] > 0
vert_edges_hor_pol = hor_polygons angle == 90
INT vert_edges_hor_pol < 0.128

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum space of GATEC is 128nm
Minimum extension of GATEC past GATEA (horizontal direction) is 22nm
per_rule.rule_script:
gatec_vert_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 90
gatea_vert_edges = GATEA ANGLE == 90
ENC gatea_vert_edges gatec_vert_edges  < 0.022

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum extension of GATEC past GATEB (horizontal direction) is 22nm
per_rule.rule_script:
gatec_vert_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 90
gateb_vert_edges = GATEB ANGLE == 90
ENC gateb_vert_edges gatec_vert_edges < 0.022

per_rule.rule_description: GATEC minimum space to ACT is 15nm
GATEC may not bend
GATEC shape bottom or top must be aligned if distance < 192nm
per_rule.rule_script:
ext_region = EXT GATEC < 0.192 REGION
angled_edges = ANGLE ext_region >0 <90
angled_regions = ext_region WITH EDGE angled_edges
GATEC INTERACT angled_regions

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of VTL/VTH/(not (VTL or VTH)) is 144nm
per_rule.rule_script:
DERIVED_LAYER_1 = VTH NOT (VTL OR VTH)
DERIVED_LAYER_2 = VTL NOT (VTL OR VTH)
INTERNAL DERIVED_LAYER_1 < 0.144
INTERNAL DERIVED_LAYER_2 < 0.144

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum spacing of VTL/VTH/(not (VTL or VTH)) is 144nm
per_rule.rule_script:
DERIVED_LAYER_1 = VTH NOT (VTL OR VTH)
DERIVED_LAYER_2 = VTL NOT (VTL OR VTH)
EXTERNAL DERIVED_LAYER_1 < 0.144 OPPOSITE
EXTERNAL DERIVED_LAYER_2 < 0.144 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum enclosure of GATEA by VTL is 64nm
Minimum enclosure of GATEB by VTL is 64nm
Minimum enclosure of GATEA by VTH is 64nm
Minimum enclosure of GATEB by VTH is 64nm
Minimum spacing of GATEA to VTL is 44nm
Minimum spacing of GATEB to VTL is 44nm
Minimum spacing of GATEA to VTH is 44nm
Minimum spacing of GATEB to VTH is 44nm
Minimum width of NIM is 128nm
Minimum Spacing of NIM is 128nm
Minimum Spacing of NIM is 128nm
Minimum width of PIM is 128nm
Minimum Spacing of PIM is 128nm
Minimum Spacing of PIM is 128nm
Minimum spacing of NIM to channel: width of SD at GATE[A] is 32nm
Minimum spacing of NIM to channel: width of SD at GATE[B] is 32nm
Minimum spacing of NIM to channel: width of SD at GATE[AB] is 32nm
Minimum spacing of PIM to channel: width of SD at GATE[A] is 32nm
Minimum spacing of PIM to channel: width of SD at GATE[B] is 32nm
Minimum spacing of PIM to channel: width of SD at GATE[AB] is 32nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Horizontal Direction): Overlap between Gate[A] and NIM  is 32nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Horizontal Direction): Overlap between Gate[B] and NIM  is 32nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Horizontal Direction): Overlap between Gate[A] and NIM  is 32nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Horizontal Direction): Overlap between Gate[B] and NIM  is 32nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Vertical Direction): Overlap between Gate[A] and NIM  is 30nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Vertical Direction): Overlap between Gate[B] and NIM  is 30nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Vertical Direction): Overlap between Gate[A] and NIM  is 30nm
Minimum Extension of NIM past channel (Vertical Direction): Overlap between Gate[B] and NIM  is 30nm
Minimum spacing of NIM to (ACT enclosed by PIM) is 0.030 um
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_ENCLOSED_PIM = ACT INSIDE PIM
EXTERNAL NIM ACT_ENCLOSED_PIM < 0.03 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum spacing of PIM to (ACT enclosed by NIM) is 0.030 um
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_ENCLOSED_NIM = ACT INSIDE NIM
EXTERNAL PIM ACT_ENCLOSED_NIM < 0.03 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum enclosure of ACT by NIM is 0.030 um
Minimum enclosure of ACT by PIM is 0.030 um
Minimum area of NIM is 0.049 um2
Minimum enclosed area of NIM is 0.049 um2
Minimum area of PIM is 0.049 um2
Minimum enclosed area of PIM is 0.049 um2
Horizontal Width of AIL1 is 28nm
Horizontal spacing of AIL1 is 36nm
per_rule.rule_script:
AIL1_VERTICAL_EDGES = AIL1 ANGLE == 90
EXTERNAL AIL1_VERTICAL_EDGES < 0.036 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum spacing of AIL1 to GATE[A] is 8nm
Minimum spacing of AIL1 to GATE[B] is 8nm
Minimum extenxion of ACT past AIL1 in horizontal direction is 2nm
per_rule.rule_script:
AIL1_VERTICAL_EDGES = AIL1 ANGLE == 90
ENC AIL1_VERTICAL_EDGES ACT < 0.002

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum Vertical length of AIL1 is 58nm
Minimum Vertical spacing of AIL1 is 62nm
per_rule.rule_script:
AIL1_HORIZONTAL_EDGES = AIL1 ANGLE == 0
EXTERNAL AIL1_HORIZONTAL_EDGES < 0.062 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum Vertical extension of AIL1 past ACT is 0nm
per_rule.rule_script:
AIL1_HORIZONTAL_EDGES = AIL1 ANGLE==0
INSIDE EDGE AIL1_HORIZONTAL_EDGES ACT

per_rule.rule_description: AIL1 layer may not bend
Horizontal width of AIL2 is 24nm
Horizontal spacing of AIL2 is 40nm
per_rule.rule_script:
AIL2_VERTICAL_EDGES = AIL2 ANGLE == 90
EXTERNAL AIL2_VERTICAL_EDGES < 0.040 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of WELL is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of WELL is 54 nm.
Minimum vertical spacing between WELL layer polygons is 108 nm.
Minimum horizontal spacing between WELL layer polygons is 54 nm.
Minimum area of WELL is 5832 nm-sq.
Minimum enclosed area of WELL is 5832 nm-sq.
Minimum horizontal extension of WELL past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 7 nm
Minimum vertical extension of WELL past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) that does not interact with SRAMDRC, is 7 nm
Exact vertical FIN width is 7 nm.
Minimum horizontal FIN width is 108 nm.
Exact vertical FIN pitch is 27 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
X_new = INTERNAL FIN_HE < 1
y = DFM COPY X_new CENTERLINE
z = MERGE y
z_copy = EXPAND EDGE z INSIDE BY 0.001
z_copy_HE = z_copy ANGLE == 0
EXTERNAL z_copy_HE < 0.026 OPPOSITE
EXTERNAL z_copy_HE > 0.026 < 0.053 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: FIN may not bend.
Exact horizontal GATE width is 20 nm.
Minimum vertical GATE width is 40 nm.
Exact horizontal GATE pitch is 54 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
{
x = INTERNAL GATE_VE < 1000 OPPOSITE
y = DFM COPY x CENTERLINE
y_copy = EXPAND EDGE y INSIDE BY 0.001
EXTERNAL y_copy < 0.053 OPPOSITE
EXTERNAL y_copy > 0.053 < 0.107 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal GATE spacing is 34 nm.

Every GATE (not cut by GCUT and not interacting with the layer SRAMDRC) must have at least one other GATE within 54 nm of its surrounding along the horizontal axis. The spacing being the distance between centers of the two GATE layer polygons.
per_rule.rule_script: NOT WITH NEIGHBOR (GATE NOT INTERACT SRAMDRC) >= 1 SPACE == 0.054  CENTERS ORTHOGONAL ONLY

per_rule.rule_description: GATE may not bend.
GATE may not be discontinuous along the vertical axis. Use GCUT layer to mark cuts in the GATE.
ACTIVE layer vertical edge may not lie inside, or coincide with, the GATE layer.
per_rule.rule_script:
ACTIVE_VE INSIDE EDGE GATE
ACTIVE_VE COINCIDENT EDGE GATE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum vertical extension of GATE (not cut by GCUT) past ACTIVE is 4 nm.
Minimum horizontal extension of ACTIVE interacting with GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 25 nm.
Minimum horizontal spacing between ACTIVE and GATE (not cut by GCUT and not interacting with ACTIVE) is 9 nm.
Minimum vertical extension of ACTIVE past FIN is 10 nm.
Minimum vertical width of ACTIVE layer is 27 nm.
ACTIVE layer vertical width increment is an integer multiple of 27 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE < 0.027
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.027 < 0.054 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.054 < 0.081 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.081 < 0.108 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.108 < 0.135 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.135 < 0.162 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.162 < 0.189 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.189 < 0.216 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.216 < 0.243 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.243 < 0.270 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.270 < 0.297 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.297 < 0.324 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.324 < 0.351 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.351 < 0.378 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.378 < 0.405 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.405 < 0.432 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.432 < 0.459 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.459 < 0.486 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.486 < 0.513 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.513 < 0.540 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.540 < 0.567 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.567 < 0.594 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.594 < 0.621 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.621 < 0.648 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.648 < 0.675 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of ACTIVE is 16 nm.
Minimum vertical spacing of ACTIVE is 27 nm.
Minimum horizontal spacing between ACTIVE layers forming source/drain regions (of different transistors) on different nets is 92 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: EXTERNAL (ACTIVE_SD NOT INTERACT SRAMDRC) > 0.020 <= 0.038 NOT CONNECTED OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal spacing of ACTIVE is 38 nm.
Minimum spacing of ACTIVE (outside the layer SRAMDRC) to WELL is 27 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: EXTERNAL WELL (ACTIVE OUTSIDE SRAMDRC) < 0.027 ABUT < 90 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum enclosure of ACTIVE (outside the layer SRAMDRC) by WELL is 27 nm.
Minimum area of an ACTIVE layer polygon that does not interact with the layer SRAMDRC is 864 nm-sq.
Minimum enclosed area of an ACTIVE layer polygon that does not interact with the layer SRAMDRC is 864 nm-sq.
ACTIVE must always be enclosed by NSELECT or PSELECT, such that no ACTIVE layer edge(s) coincide with NSELECT or PSELECT layer edge(s).
per_rule.rule_script:
ACTIVE NOT INSIDE (NSELECT OR PSELECT)
ACTIVE COINCIDENT EDGE (NSELECT OR PSELECT)

per_rule.rule_description: A notch in ACTIVE along vertical axis is not allowed.
Maximum distance, to prevent latch-up, between ACTIVE forming a MOS device and ACTIVE forming a bulk/substrate contact within the same WELL/substrate is 30 um.
per_rule.rule_script:
ACTIVE_MOS_SD = (WELL AND ACTIVE) AND PSELECT
ACT_TAP = (NSELECT AND ACTIVE) AND WELL
ACT_TAP_VE = ACT_TAP ANGLE == 90
ACT_TAP_EXE = EXPAND EDGE ACT_TAP_VE OUTSIDE BY 30
ACT_TAP_DERIVED = DFM COPY ACT_TAP ACT_TAP_EXE
a = ACT_TAP SIZE BY 30
ACTIVE_MOS_SD NOT INSIDE  a

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum vertical width of GCUT is 17 nm.
Minimum vertical spacing between GCUT and channel is 4 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: EXTERNAL GCUT_HE CHANNELR_HE  < VAR_EUV_MISALI ABUT < 90 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal extension of GCUT past GATE is 17 nm.
Minimum spacing of GCUT to GATE, when the former is not being used to cut a particular polygon drawn using the latter, is 17 nm.
Minimum vertical spacing between two GCUT layer polygons is 35 nm.
GCUT layer may not exist without the layer GATE.
GCUT layer vertical edge may not lie inside, or coincide with, the GATE layer.
per_rule.rule_script:
GCUT_VE INSIDE EDGE GATE
GCUT_VE COINCIDENT EDGE GATE

per_rule.rule_description: GCUT may not interact with channel.
Minimum horizontal width of NSELECT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of NSELECT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by NSELECT is 46 nm.
Minimum vertical enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by NSELECT is 27 nm.
Minimum horizontal extension of NSELECT past GATE (not cut by GCUT) is 7 nm.
Minimum vertical extension of NSELECT past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 7 nm.
Minimum horizontal width of PSELECT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of PSELECT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by PSELECT 46 nm.
Minimum vertical enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by PSELECT is 27 nm.
Minimum horizontal extension of PSELECT past GATE (not cut by GCUT) is 7 nm.
Minimum vertical extension of PSELECT past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 7 nm.
NSELECT and PSELECT may not overlap
Minimum horizontal width of SLVT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of SLVT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by SLVT is 46 nm.
Minimum vertical enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by SLVT is 27 nm.
Minimum horizontal extension of SLVT past GATE (not cut by GCUT) is 7 nm.
Minimum vertical extension of SLVT past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 7 nm.
Minimum horizontal width of LVT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of LVT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by LVT is 46 nm.
Minimum vertical enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by LVT is 27 nm.
Minimum horizontal extension of LVT past GATE (not cut by GCUT) is 7 nm.
Minimum vertical extension of LVT past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 7 nm.
Minimum horizontal width of SRAMVT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of SRAMVT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by SRAMVT is 46 nm.
Minimum vertical enclosure of ACTIVE (not interacting with SRAMDRC) by SRAMVT is 27 nm.
Minimum horizontal extension of SRAMVT past GATE (not cut by GCUT) is 7 nm.
Minimum vertical extension of SRAMVT past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 7 nm.
Width of dummy should be 40 nm
DUMMY spacing from CHANNEL in horizontal direction is 24 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
EXTERNAL CHANNEL_VE DUMMY_VE <0.024 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL ACTIVE_VE DUMMY_VE < 0.001

per_rule.rule_description: DUMMY must exactly overlap active and may not extend beyond it vertically
per_rule.rule_script:
Dum_Act = DUMMY NOT ACTIVE
Dum_Act_HE = Dum_Act ANGLE == 0
EXTERNAL ACTIVE_HE Dum_Act_HE >0.001 < 0.002 ABUT OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: DUMMY must overlap active. DUMMY without active is not allowed
Minimum horizontal width of SDT is 24 nm.
Minimum vertical width of SDT (not interacting with SRAMDRC) is 27 nm.
SDT (not interacting with SRAMDRC) layer vertical width increment is an integer multiple of 27 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
{
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.027 < 0.054 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.054 < 0.081 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.081 < 0.108 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.108 < 0.135 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.135 < 0.162 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.162 < 0.189 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.189 < 0.216 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.216 < 0.243 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.243 < 0.270 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.270 < 0.297 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.297 < 0.324 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.324 < 0.351 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.351 < 0.378 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.378 < 0.405 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.405 < 0.432 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.432 < 0.459 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.459 < 0.486 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.486 < 0.513 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.513 < 0.540 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.540 < 0.567 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.567 < 0.594 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.594 < 0.621 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.621 < 0.648 OPPOSITE
INTERNAL SDT_NIS_HE > 0.648 < 0.675 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal spacing between two SDT layer polygons is 30 nm.
Minimum horizontal spacing between SDT and GATE is 5 nm.
Minimum vertical overlap between SDT and ACTIVE is 27 nm.
Minimum vertical overlap between SDT and LISD is 27 nm.
SDT and GATE may not overlap or touch.
SDT (not interacting with SRAMDRC) horizontal edges must coincide with ACTIVE horizontal edges.
SDT may not be entirely outside ACTIVE.
SDT must always be inside LISD.
Minimum width of LISD is 24 nm.
Minimum (side-to-side) spacing between two LISD layer polygons' edges, when both edges are > 36 nm, is 18 nm.
Minimum (tip-to-side) spacing between two LISD layer polygons' edges, when one edge is <= 36 nm and the other edge is > 36 nm, is 25 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
{
EXTERNAL LISD_TIP LISD_SIDE < 0.025 ABUT < 90 PROJECTING NOT CORNER OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum (tip-to-tip) spacing between two LISD layer polygons' (lying completely outside the layer SRAMDRC) edges, when both edges are >= 24 nm and <= 36 nm, is 27 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
{
EXTERNAL LISD_OS_WIDE_TIP < 0.027 ABUT < 90 PROJECTING NOT CORNER OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum LISD area is 648 nm-sq.
Minimum width of LIG is 16 nm.
Minimum (side-to-side) spacing between two LIG layer polygons' edges, when both edges are > 36 nm, is 18 nm.
Minimum (tip-to-side) spacing between two LIG layer polygons' edges, when one edge is <= 36 nm and the other edge is > 36 nm, is 25 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
{
EXTERNAL LIG_TIP LIG_SIDE < 0.025 ABUT < 90 PROJECTING NOT CORNER OPPOSITE
